scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F5F0E8]
scales.quote: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-serif italic text-[#C9A84C] leading-snug

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous whitespace, asymmetric grids, breathing room.

textures_and_surfaces.noise_overlay: Fixed full-screen div with pointer-events-none, z-50, opacity-[0.03], mix-blend-overlay, SVG noise background.
textures_and_surfaces.mesh_gradient: Hero background uses CSS radial-gradient circles in #1F4788 and #C9A84C with intense blur (blur-3xl), opacity ~15%, placed asymmetrically.
textures_and_surfaces.cards: Flat bg-[#111116], 1px border border-[#888880]/15. No heavy drop shadows. Hover: border-[#C9A84C]/50 transition-colors duration-500.
textures_and_surfaces.dividers: Horizontal rules: <hr className='border-t border-[#C9A84C]/30 my-12' />. Vertical rules used in timelines.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling mandatory for premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Framer Motion: initial={opacity: 0, y: 30}, whileInView={opacity: 1, y: 0}, transition={duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]}. Stagger children.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Slow transitions (duration-500). Buttons fill with gold or navy. Text links get an underline expansion.
motion_and_interactions.cursor_glow: A subtle radial gradient following the mouse pointer, visible only on desktop, opacity-20.

nav.style: Sticky top-0 z-40 py-6 transition-all duration-300. Transparent at top, bg-[#0D0D0D]/90 backdrop-blur-md on scroll.
nav.links: Hidden on mobile. font-mono text-sm uppercase text-[#888880] hover:text-[#F5F0E8]
nav.mobile_menu: Full-screen overlay bg-[#0D0D0D], massive font-serif links.

hero.headline: 'I Build AI Systems That Turn Messy Work Into Repeatable Execution.' in H1 styling, text-[#F5F0E8].

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#0D0D0D] px-8 py-4 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#F5F0E8] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C9A84C]/50 text-[#C9A84C] px-8 py-4 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:border-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#C9A84C]/10 transition-colors

hero.badge: Top-right absolute or grid placed: minimal badge with gold border 'Certified AI Generalist'

about.layout: 2-column asymmetric. Col 1 (span 5): Profile Photo with gold accent border. Col 2 (span 7): Pull-quote, bio paragraphs, 4 stat cards.
about.stat_cards: Grid of 2 or 4. bg-[#111116], p-6, border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]. Value: text-3xl font-serif text-[#F5F0E8]. Label: text-xs font-mono text-[#888880].

competencies.chips: Rounded-full border border-[#888880]/30 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-[#888880] hover:border-[#C9A84C] hover:text-[#C9A84C] cursor-pointer transition-colors

project_cards.style: Editorial large cards. bg-[#111116] border border-[#888880]/15 p-8 flex flex-col justify-end min-h-[400px].
project_cards.image_treatment: NO STOCK PHOTOS. Use pure CSS abstract geometric gradients inside the card or as a header block.
project_cards.content: Category tag (mono text-xs text-[#C9A84C]), Title (serif H3 text-[#F5F0E8]), Description (sans text-base text-[#888880]).

gpt_ecosystem.card: Horizontal or stacked editorial layout. Vertical chip (rotated text) or small label area. Title & specs. Hover reveals subtle navy border/glow.

timeline.structure: Left border absolute (border-l border-[#C9A84C]/30). Items have a gold dot relative to the border.
timeline.certifications: Grid of minimal text-based cards. Gold accents.

contact.layout: Three editorial cards (Freelance / Hiring / Collaboration) acting as buttons to mailto links with prefilled subjects.

media.rule_for_images: Use the provided profile photo for the Identity/About section. For all other sections (Projects, Agents, etc.), USE ONLY CSS ABSTRACT GRADIENTS AND GEOMETRY. Do not use stock imagery or image placeholders.

accessibility.contrast_notes: Navy (#1F4788) on Black (#0D0D0D) fails text contrast. Use Navy ONLY for background accents, subtle mesh gradients, and large structural elements. Use Warm White (#F5F0E8) and Gold (#C9A84C) for all readable text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (links, buttons, filter chips, project cards) MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-work-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS.
2. Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion @studio-freight/lenis lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
3. Add Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono) to index.html or import in CSS.
4. Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors provided in this JSON.
5. Do NOT use Shadcn UI cards. Build custom HTML/Tailwind editorial layouts for all sections.
6. Apply a global SVG noise overlay in the App root.
7. Implement a custom cursor glow effect using framer-motion that tracks mouse position (desktop only).
8. Ensure every major section has an ID for the smooth scroll anchor links.
9. Strictly adhere to the typography scale: Display Serif for H1/H2, Mono for labels/tags, Clean Sans for paragraphs.
